entry.title: Issue with file uploader in sap Fiori custom apps after upgrade
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

Recently we have upgraded our HANA version from 2020 to 2023 and also the UI5 version from 1.84 to 1.120.

File uploader control is not working as expecting in custom fiori application after upgrade , getting the error "Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '0')" while reading file[0] and below is the code .

Above same code is working fine in non upgraded system. Can some suggest how to fix this issue ? 

KR,

Anji

entry.title: Fiori Elements + RAP: How to preserve order of batch action calls? Wrong Batch order.
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm working on a Fiori Elements app based on RAP (ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model).
The user scans equipment one by one and then triggers a Print Label action.
The labels should be printed in the exact order the equipment was scanned, but sometimes they are printed in the wrong order.

What I observed:

  • The action printLabel is defined in the behavior definition.

  • When multiple rows are selected and the action is triggered, the backend method is called multiple times — once for each entity.

  • Although the UI sends a $batch, the printLabel method is executed separately per entity, and not necessarily in order.

This results in labels being printed in the wrong sequence, which causes confusion and extra manual effort.

My Behavior definition:

managed implementation in class ZBP_I_Equipment
strict(2);

define behavior for Z_I_Equipment alias Equipment
persistent table I_Equipment
lock master
{
    field( readonly ) Equipment;
    action printLabel;
}

 

My questions:

  1. Is there a way to ensure that printLabel is called once with all selected entries, preserving their original selection order?

  2. Is it possible to change the behavior to support multiple processing (e.g. on entity ... multiple) in this RAP setup?

  3. Are there best practices for preserving processing order in such scenarios?

Any guidance or working examples would be greatly appreciated.
Thank you!

entry.title: Error on Logout event from SAP Build Work Zone in SAPUI5 page
entry.content:
I am trying to attach a callback to the Logout event from the SAP Build Work Zone in my SAPUI5 application, to then request a logout in my approuter application. This is the logic I added to enable the event:

// UI5 Component
export default class Component extends UIComponent {
	//...
	public init(): void {
		//...

		// Log out when the user clicks the logout button in the shell header (BWZ)
		Container.attachLogoutEvent(() => {
			console.log("Logout event triggered, redirecting to logout endpoint.");
			window.location.replace('/do/logout');
		}, false)
	}
}

 The callback is working on my local tests, and I can see the log message on the console. However, when I try to do same thing inside our SAP Build Work Zone subscription, the callback doesn't run and we see a error message:

 After investigating the source files I notices this error happens when the Logout Event is being created and a deprecated part of the code executes. I wasn't able to find any configurations on SAP Build Work Zone that would fix it, but I might have missed something?

Has anyone else seen this error before? How can I contact the SAP Build Work Zone team to get support?

Thanks

entry.title: Need custom button to download an excel file in RAP application
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

In my RAP application I want to incorporate custom download action in list report page. So that when I click on that I need to download a custom excel sheet. 

Can we achieve this in RAP application, If yes, then how?

if not, what other options I can follow?

Thanks and Regards,

Prasanth.

entry.title: Error while deploying SAPUI5 app via visual studio code to on premise server
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have created a basic SAPUI5 app on visual studio code and i have deployed it to on premise server with bsp name as "ZDemoBinding".

After i make some changes in view/controller again when i am trying to build and deploy app to on premise server with same details as that of deployed first time i am getting below displayed error.

I have followed tutorial to upload app to on premise server.

Please let me know if anything needs to be changed in existing UI5 app so that it can be deployed again to on premise server as i am unable to find anything regarding this.

.nwabaprc file screenshot.

Package.json file

ui5.yaml file

ui5-deploy.yaml file

 

Please help if anyone knows how to update the existing z bsp application which is deployed to on premise server after making changes..

entry.title: Copying Custom Fields from Sales Orders to Purchase Orders created thru Purchase Requisition
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a way we can create an enhancement to copy the value of a Custom field from the Sales order to the Purchase Order? 

Please note that we are in the SAP Public Cloud. For the usual copy control such as Sales to Billing, there are available enhancements we can do, however for Sales to PR/PO, there's only a function to copy "Texts". 

Our business requirement is to copy the custom fields value from SO to PO. 

 

Regards,

Edmund

entry.title: element.style in SAP UI5 - how to find from which jQuery or js file did the element come from?
Random error Cannot convert data <.> into type <DECIMAL>. Context: Column <>
entry.content:
We are using SAP BODS on  an Oracle database. From time to time the same dataflow aborts with the error Cannot convert data <.> into type <DECIMAL>. Context: Column <>  . Without specification which data or column is affected.

All mappings on decimal fields  in this dataflow are from decimal to decimal or from decimal to integer. All decimals are of the form decimal(n,0) .  The underlying Oracle columns are number(38,0). The same dataflow is successful when executed  a bit later but on presumably the same data -no transformations are run on this data between abortion and new run.  The error message provides the name of  the transform which fails and references some Join48 which is probably  some execution step of the transform. But we are not able to exactly localize the causing issue.  Is there a way to find the  information, what object the Join48 is referring to?

entry.title: AWS system-reboot
entry.content: We currently have a SAP B1 9.3 MSSQL runnings in AWS. AWS has a scheduled "system-reboot" that will happen in 2 days, the AI in AWS says that our host will change as a consequence of said "system-reboot" how will that affect the license currently set in our SAP B1 9.3? If ever the "system-reboot" changes our hardware key can we still use it? even temporarily while awaiting for our partner to issue us a new license based on the new hardware key?

entry.title: Can't connect to virtual IP using embacadero dbartisan 2016
entry.content:
I have a virtual ip sitting on 2 nodes. SAP installed on both nodes with binaries on each nodes and data files etc on a shared disk that fails over between both nodes. I am trying to connect through embacadero dbartisan 2016 to the virtual ip but am getting the following error.

15:12:26.540 DBMS ) ct_connect(): network packet layer: internal net library error: Net-Lib protocol driver call to connect two endpoints failed (08001)

I can connect to each node through embacadero dbartisan 2016 but can't connect to the Virtual ip. I have added the virtual IP to the sqlini file. Is there something else for this to be able to connect?

entry.title: Tree Table loads data only in client operationModeand not in server operationMode
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

I am developing a tree table with basic odata binding and tree annotations(same as given in SDK). However in my case  data is shown only when I use operationMode:'Client'.

 need to filter data based on some Phases, but with  operationMode : client, the filter is ignored.

And when I use operationMode:Server, data is fetched from the backend ,but the table appers blank.

Please find below the xml code -

 <TreeTable id="TreeTableBasic" rowActionCount="1" rows="{

            path : '/MasterscreenSet',      

            parameters : {

            countMode: 'Inline',

            operationMode:'Client',

            numberOfExpandedLevels: '{helperJson>/numberOfExpandedLevels}',

                treeAnnotationProperties : {

                    hierarchyLevelFor : 'HierarchyLevel',

                    hierarchyNodeFor : 'NodeID',

                    hierarchyParentNodeFor : 'ParentNodeID',

                    hierarchyDrillStateFor : 'DrillState'

                }

            }

        }"

        enableSelectAll="false" selectionMode="None" ariaLabelledBy="title" class="teamTableText" rowMode="Interactive" enableBusyIndicator="true"

        busyIndicatorDelay="0" dataReceived="onDataReceived">

Thanks & Regards,

Aastha

SAPUI5 OData  SAP Fiori Makers

entry.title: Test SAPUI5 app locally with multiple deployed CAPM services each with its own XSUAA instance.
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,
I have a SAPUI5 app that consumes 2 or more CAPM services, and each service has its own bound xsuaa instance. I am using @SAP/approuter to test the UI5 app locally with deployed services. I tried adding the two xsuaa credential details into the xsuaa array inside the default-env.json. Still, when I run the local approuter using npm start, I get an error that says 'No UAA service found' as seen in the screenshot below.
For now, I have to deploy the app and test in BTP launchpad every time. How can I achieve local testing with multiple xsuaa instances? 

File: default-env.json - PS: xsuaa json objects are collapsed due to sensitive info.

local-test-approuter / package.json - I have the latest @SAP/approuter

local-test-approuter / xs-app.json

Any suggestions and solutions will be greatly appreciated.

Thanks & Cheers,
Naresh

entry.title: Failed to load UI5 component for navigation intent "#SalesOrder-manageV2"
S4/HANA - How to develop an SAPUI5 app calling a backend logic
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I want to know if there's any way to develop an app that simulates a screen, just like we had in ECC, with selection criteria.

The idea is to have a class developed in the back end and then have an app developed in SAPUI5 that calls it, without necessarily needing an OData service.

Kind Regards,

Marcelo Romeiro

entry.title: i want to merge the dulplicate values in sap.m.table and align them to center as shown in image
entry.content:
The table has to be formatted as above image and below is the table which i have removed duplicates using  mergeDuplicates="true"

view.xml

<mvc:View
  controllerName="formscoring.controller.View1"
  xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc"
  xmlns="sap.m">
  
  <Page id="page" title="Supplier Quality Monthly Scoring">
    <content>
      <Table id="SupplierTable" items="{supplier>/SupplierScoring}" inset="false" >
        <columns>
          <Column hAlign="Center" mergeDuplicates="true" class="centerVertical"><Text text="Category" /></Column>
          <Column hAlign="Center" mergeDuplicates="true" class="centerVertical"><Text text="Item" /></Column>
          <Column hAlign="Center" mergeDuplicates="true" class="centerVertical"><Text text="Performance Metric" /></Column>
          <Column hAlign="Center" mergeDuplicates="true" class="centerVertical"><Text text="Criteria / Weightage" /></Column>
          <Column hAlign="Center" mergeDuplicates="true" class="centerVertical"><Text text="Max Score" /></Column>
          <Column hAlign="Center" class="centerVertical"><Text text="Score" /></Column>
          <Column hAlign="Center" class="centerVertical"><Text text="Remarks / Justification" /></Column>
        </columns>
        <items>
          <ColumnListItem   >
            <cells >
              <Text class="centerVertical" text="{supplier>Category}"  />
              <Text class="centerVertical" text="{supplier>Item}" />
              <Text class="centerVertical" text="{supplier>PerformanceMetric}" />
              <Text class="centerVertical" text="{supplier>Criteria}" />
              <Text class="centerVertical" text="{supplier>MaxScore}" />
              <Text class="centerVertical" text="{supplier>Score}" />
              <Text class="centerVertical" text="{supplier>Remarks}" />
            </cells>
          </ColumnListItem>
        </items>
      </Table>
    </content>
  </Page>
</mvc:View>
 
.centerVertical {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  height: 100%;
  justify-content: center;
  text-align: center;
}

entry.title: alternative Transaction for the "BP" transaction similar to the old transaction XD01, vd01, fd01 etc
entry.content:
Hello community,

I'm facing the issue that our users are struggling to get used to the new BP transaction.
They are asking for alternatives similar to ECC, where it was possible to create a customer or vendor directly with the corresponding role—without first having to switch from the general role to the desired one.

I know that the old transactions are technically outdated, but they still work for now. However, this might change with any new release, so it's not a viable long-term option for me.

While browsing through the customizing settings, I noticed that it's possible to create custom transactions. I also saw that there are already predefined transactions like FLCU1, BUA1-3, BUI1-3.
Is there a reason why SAP hasn't provided similar transactions for all other roles as well?

entry.title: Synchronous Goods Receipts in EWM decentralized warehouses with MIGO
entry.content:
Scenario: 2 EWM decentralized warehouses mapped under the same ERP plant.  Shipments between warehouses are done daily in both directions. No billing / invoicing involved. 
Request: Research possibility to trigger the movements directly from MIGO tx. (311 movement) in order to avoid the standard INTRACO STO.  Currently they managed both physical warehouses under the same roof at their current WMS. We want to find the easiest setup to avoid this configuration in the future
Comments: 

  • Could we use Synchronous goods receipt in this scenario? My understanding is that we cannot. 
  • Is there any way to trigger the deliveries from MIGO under this scenario?
  • Suggestions and /or experiences for this kind of situations are welcome. 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: How to get the content of a file selected via File Uploader?
entry.content:
Hi,
I am pretty new in SAPUI5 apps,
In my app i have a file uploader button.

What i need is very basic.
When user selects a file i need to get the content of this file (raw, binary...etc).

Then i can send this content to an odata service.

Here is my sample code: Please provide me a sample code or tell me where i can see the content.

Thanks.

Here is my: View1.view.xml

 <mvc:View controllerName="project2.controller.View1"
    xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc"
    xmlns="sap.m"
    xmlns:unified="sap.ui.unified">

    <Page id="page" title="{i18n>title}">
        <content> 

        <HBox id="buttonLine" width="100%" justifyContent="Center">
            <Button xmlns="sap.m" text="Download Template" id="button0" width="620px" press="onDownloadTemplateButtonPress" /> 

            <unified:FileUploader id="fileUploader" change="onFileChange" visible="true" buttonOnly="true" width="620px" buttonText="Upload Excel File"/>
            </HBox>
        
        </content> 
    </Page>
    
</mvc:View>

 

Here is my: View1.controller.js

----View1.controller.js----
onFileChange: function (oEvent) {
var oFile = oEvent.getParameter("files")[0];


if (oFile) {

this._oSelectedFile = oFile;

var oReader = new FileReader();

oReader.onload = function (oEvent) {

var sFileContent = oEvent.target.result;
var oPayload = {
FileName: this._oSelectedFile.name, // File name
MimeType: this._oSelectedFile.type, // File MIME type
FileContent: btoa(sFileContent) // Encode file content as Base64
};

var oTextArea = this.byId("fileContentArea");
oTextArea.setValue(sFileContent);
}.bind(this);

oReader.readAsText(oFile);
}
},

WHY IS MY QUESTION A SPAM?

WHICH PART?

AND WHY IS THE NUMBER WHICH INDICATES THE NUMBER OF PEOPLE WHO SAW THIS POST INCREASES WHENEVER I REFRESH THIS PAGE?

entry.title: Delay data loading of SAP Macros table until button click? - UI5
entry.content:
Hi all - Wanted to know if its possible to delay loading of data from a macros table within a XML fragment? Currently, when you click on a list page record -> open object page -> my macros table in a custom section renders, and loads all table data correctly. All of this data is via CDS entity where I define the metaPath in my XML fragment. Table renders, and data loads in just fine. 

Now, I would like to extend the functionality by adding a button ("Get Data") in the object page custom section, that when clicked, will load the data, and not when user opens the object page. Anybody have any examples of this I can potentially reference? 

Right now, my initial thoughts were using the pre-made controller JS extension file for my object page to try to not bind the data in the onInit() function? Then in my controller file for the XML fragment load the frag, and bind the data upon button click?

 
sap.ui.define(
[
    "sap/m/MessageToast",
    'sap/ui/model/Filter',
    'sap/ui/model/FilterOperator',
    'sap/ui/core/Fragment'

], function(MessageToast, Filter, FilterOperator, Fragment) {
    'use strict';
    return {
        onLoadData: async function (oEvent) {
                  ***load fragment -> find macros table ID -> bind elements via metapath to entity?***
        }
    };
});

__PRESENT

__PRESENT__PRESENT

entry.title: how to use forceGlobalRefresh for adaptation project in Manifest_appdescr filehow to use forceGlobal
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I'm working on an adaptation project which was previously using SAPUI5 version 1.96. Following an upgrade the SAPUI5 version changed to 1.130, after the upgrade forceGlobalRefresh is set defaults to false (as per the behavior introduced in version 1.106).

I need to explicitly enable forceGlobalRefresh for the application, but adding the property directly to the manifest_appdescr.json file using the following configuration does not appear to have any effect:

{
     "changeType": "appdescr_ui_generic_app_setSettings",
     "content": {
                              "settings": {
                              "draftEnabled": true,
                              "forceGlobalRefresh": true
                          }
     }
}

 

Any suggestion or solution to fix this will be greatly appreciated.

 

 

SAPUI5
